The vital moment happened earlier, though, when Colbert shifted from his warm, zany performance art back to political satire. “I am a transformational historical figure,” Stephen Colbert told us. Secondly, even if these recyclable plastic versions are introduced as promised (and there's no guarantee they will be widely adopted or effectively used), K-Cups still present significant environmental issues beyond just waste disposal: 1. Energy Consumption: The production process for each individual cup is energy-intensive due to the aluminum lining and small size of cups, which means more material per unit volume compared with bulk coffee brewing methods. 2. Resource Use & Waste Generation During Production: - Each K-Cup requires a significant amount of resources (water, electricity) during manufacturing. 3. Consumer Behavior: Even if recycling options are available and effective for the new recyclable cups introduced by Keurig Green Mountain in 2016 or later models like their Vue system with plastic pods that can be recycled through TerraCycle programs but require consumer effort to separate components. 4. Cost Implications: - The cost of K-Cups is significantly higher than traditional coffee brewing methods, which adds an economic burden on consumers and may discourage them from switching away even if more sustainable options are available. 5. Recycling Infrastructure Challenges: Recycling facilities might face difficulties in processing the small size cups or dealing with contamination issues like leftover grounds. In summary: - The timeline for Keurig Green Mountain to address K-Cup waste is extremely long, leading many environmental advocates and consumers alike questioning its commitment towards sustainability practices. Alternative solutions such as reusable coffee filters (e.g., French press), bulk ground beans in recyclable containers or composting pods like those from companies aiming at zero-waste models are often recommended. In truth she was much more than a poet, producing works in practically every genre of literature. But poetry is how she first made her name, and it is whathas endured, a testament to her skill with language and her profound understanding of the human experience. texts.full_text: with renal complications. The nature of renal injury from bisphosphonates has become clearer in recent years. Pamidronate can rarely cause (collapsing) focal segmental glomerular sclerosis with the nephrotic syndrome and renal insufficiency. This renal complication has also been observed with other bisphosphonates but only in isolated cases. Otherwise, long-term use of high doses or intravenous administration can lead to acute interstitial pneumonia (AIP) which is a serious lung condition that occurs due to inflammation and scarring affecting the air sacs within your lungs leading potentially fatal respiratory complications thus it presents substantial risks over extended periods. Additionally one must take care because repeated post-menopausal women using high doses of alendronate for vertebral fractures may develop osteonecrosis (avascular necrosis) in hips, shoulders or knees although this is quite rare with these drugs leading to bone deformity and pain needing surgical intervention if necessary thus causing added morbidity from both conditions . Thus it remains essential that clinicians who prescribe bisphosphonates adequately screen patients for risk factors which may aggravate renal/renal tract damage prior starting therapy & monitor them closely - averting severe consequences in majority of individuals through this required prudent management . Further research is needed to better understand the subset population effects leading towards precise guidance on administration regime tailoring, precautions prevention avoiding harmful outcome escalation especially elderly patients struggling with various degenerative diseases. Would any of y'all pay that for this gun? And WTF is up with this video? Guys running around with paintball masks on? Originally Posted By Gentleman4561: But what makes it worth over 2 grand? I don't know if it makes it worth over $2k, but what makes it cost over $2k is simple business strategy. 1. Put names behind it for the Kool-Aid kids 2. Put designs & products on it that are one of kind and so unique that no other manufacturers can easily replicate them. 3. Use premium materials: By incorporating high-quality metals, precision engineering components, or specialized coatings, they increase both performance and perceived value. 4. Build an exclusive brand image through marketing strategies targeting a niche market willing to pay more for exclusivity rather than functional superiority alone. 5. Offer customizability features that allow users to personalize their weapons extensively, which can justify higher costs due to the additional labor or materials involved in producing unique variations on request. 6. Create limited editions with restricted production numbers—scarcity often drives demand and price up as collectors vie for something rare or special. In summary, it’s less about any inherent technological superiority over other guns that already cost far less—and more about creating an allure through exclusivity, branding, quality of materials used, custom options, uniqueness in design/functionality (such as exclusive accessories like the rail), and scarcity. These factors combined are often enough to justify a high price tag for many enthusiasts who value being part of something they consider elite or unique. Regarding your comment about paintball masks in videos: it's possible that those marketing these guns prioritize safety during demonstrations, especially if showcasing practical shooting scenarios which can be quite intense with less-than-ideal backdrops. Ther… November 23, 2017 by Michael Pullam How to use the holidays to get in shape for the New Year I don’t know about you, but this time of year is always really stressful. We are rushing around trying to get everything done before the end of the year. We have all those family functions to attend. We are trying to get the house ready for the guests that will be coming over. We are trying to get all the presents bought and wrapped. We are trying to cook all the meals and desserts for the parties. It is crazy! Then once the holidays pass, we feel like we have just been hit by a truck and we swear that we will never do this to ourselves again. And that is just how we feel. We don’t even want to think about what this is doing to our bodies. This is also the time of year when people are most likely to quit their fitness programs and say they will get back to it after the holidays are over. Well, I have a suggestion for you. texts.full_text: n content Skip to navigation About me Research Teaching Contact CV Bengt Söderlund I am an Assistant Professor at the Department of Economics at Lund University. I am also an affiliatemember of CESifo and a visiting scholar at the Max Planck Institute for Research on Collective Goods in Munich. My research focuses on topics related to industrial organization, political economics, and behavioral economics. Particularly, I am interested in how firms' strategies shape their outcomes and how they are affected by market regulations. I have published articles in journals such as Journal of Economic Behavior & Organization, The Review of Industrial Organization, and Industrial & Corporate Change among others. My work has been reported in outlets like Forbes Magazine, Huffington Post, and Der Spiegel. My teaching covers a wide range of topics in Microeconomics including Industrial Organization, Market Structures, Game Theory and Political Economy as well as the Economics of Regulation. I received my Ph.D. from the European University Institute (EUI) in Florence in June 2015 with a dissertation on the political economy of regulation of financial markets. texts.full_text: ow edgy and artistic Berlin is, how ubercool the scene of new musicians in their hip clothes are – there have even existed several stereotypes for German women during my life: blonde Helga from Dusseldorf with her muscular Bavarian husband Hans-Georg. Then came Fraulein Brigitte Bardot who'd seduced Parisian men like nobody else and made Germans look tres sexy, then a bitch of an Eva Braun (or maybe it was Hitler?), later Angela Merkel – the most powerful woman in Europe... I have no idea what I expect from Berlin now! But there are two things that give me faith: first - Germany is one country which does not despise Latvia and even likes us. Second, Germans never disappoint you when they invite someone to their place for a visit – be it Goethe or some other writer... They always offer the best of themselves in culture-diplomacy! The German Embassy has informed me that I'll meet my friend Christoph Wagner there whom we invited and hosted at "Homo Novus" last year. We had long conversations about many topics then, but he was so impressed with Latvia – its vast forests where even Hitler couldn´t find a Jew to kill... texts.full_text: into the story over time, and appears in these books in four types: continuous, suspended, stuttering, and brief. An introduction trigger refers to the immediate reason the character is introduced, and appears here in five types: by the story, by association, by background, by others, and by needed expertise. Types of Character Introduction Structures: Continuous: A continuous introduction includes a lengthy introduction and description of a character the very first time the character is encountered. McPhee uses this structure to introduce the three expert fishermen, Buddy Grucela, Erwin Dietz, and Gerald Hartzel. On page 5, these three men are mentioned for the first time: “[Cervone] knew he wasn’t fishing with Buddy Grucela. He knew he wasn’t fishing with Erwin Dietz or Gerald Hartzel – living figures in the Cooperstown of shad.” There is a short paragraph, and then McPhee begins a more than two-page description of Dietz and Hartzel, in sequence, before entering and even lengthier description of Grucela. At no point during the introduction and description of these three men does McPhee return to the present story (that of him fishing with the Cervones in the Delaware River). The three expert fishermen are called by name, then brought into the book with lengthy descriptions. Suspended: A suspended introduction includes an initial mention of a character, by name or “profession,” then a later lengthy introduction after other action or discussion has occurred. McPhee uses this structure to introduce the other two fishermen that appear

texts.full_text: Belgium. The Past Whispers... TOC Saturday, November 5, 2016 La Fontaine Park Prior to 1845, the land plot where the La Fontaine Park is was occupied by M. James Logan's farm. In 1845, the government of Canada purchased Logan’s land and used it as a training ground for British soldiers. In the second hLa Fontaine Park, located in Montreal, had a significant history before its establishment as a public space. Prior to 1845, the land was part of James Logan's farm until it was purchased by the Canadian government that year and used for military training up until around 1903. Post-military use from approximately 1907 onwards, there is no direct information available on who designed or built La Fontaine Park. Researchers have checked various historical books (e.g., "Old Montreal" and local histories), newspapers of the period, government archives, online resources like BAnQ, Google Maps, Virtual Museum Canada, as well as reached out to organizations such as the LaFontaine Branch RC Services and libraries in Point Claire. Despite these efforts, no definitive information has been found regarding its design or construction. Further research

texts.full_text: as developed. The mirror is positioned at 45 degrees in front of the patient, who has to look at his own eyes during the acquisition of the scan. In order to test the accuracy of the technique, two CBCT scans were taken for each patient enrolled: one with the new mirror-based technique and one without. Both CBCTs were analyzed and compared to evaluate the presence of asymmetries and/or tilts of the head. texts.full_text: level tests within each region.[@R12] Results are summarized across each annotated region, and if the proportion of differentially methylated cytosines exceeds some ad hoc and arbitrary threshold (e.g., 10%), the region is declared differentially methylated. We refer to this standard approach as the MAGI~C~ approach. MAGI~C~ can be thought of as a special case of the sliding window approaches,[@R8]^,^[@R9] where the non-overlapping genomic 'windows' represent regions of homogeneous methylation profiles; in this sense, MAGI~C~ represents the most powerful, best-case sliding window scenario. Since each cytosine is tested individually, the region-level summary is a comparison of methylation patterns between treatment groups. While this exploration is centered on regions that define a gene, it is natural to extend the approach to other annotations (e.g., promoters, exons, intergenic regions, etc.). Since MAGI~C~ compares the patterns of methylation between treatments, it is suitable for regions where a classification of "methylated" or "unmethylated" is not of interest (e.g., intergenic regions). texts.full_text: le is wide and has many duplicates, while the other is small (relatively few rows) and known to be distinct. A wide build side with lots of duplicates plays to the hash table's strengths because it is immediately only stored once per dupe. How it works The Hash Union operator builds a hash table on the upper (build) input eliminating duplicates as it goes (like a hash aggregate performing a distinct). It then reads rows from the lower (probe) input. If there is no match in the hash table, the row is returned. When the probe input is exhausted, the operator returns each row in the hash table. Hash Union does not add rows from the probe side to the hash table, so it cannot eliminate duplicates from that input. The optimizer either has to have a guarantee of uniqueness, or add a grouping operator to the probe side. A: The UNION operator combines all the rows from one query with all the rows from another, eliminating duplicates, and forming a single list.
